decision: Wrote the new plan-file location/naming convention canonically in master-plan-format.md and had phase-brief-format.md, the orchestrator SKILL run preamble, and approval-gate-protocol.md cite it, rather than restating the rule in each file.
alternative_not_taken: Duplicating the full convention text in both the master-plan and phase-brief format files (and inline in the orchestrator).
rationale: Master plan and phase briefs share one initiative folder, so the convention is one rule, not two. Single-sourcing it matches the constellation's own cite-don't-restate doctrine and prevents the two copies drifting apart later.
